name: Assign Customers Specific Invoice Layouts or Designs
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To assign a specific layout to a customer you first need to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1107-customise-email-and-print-templates", "children": [{"text": "create or edit your own document layouts"}]}, {"text": ". If you're not comfortable with HTML, CSS and Neto's B@SE language, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners"}]}, {"text": " can create one for you."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Example usage:", "bold": true}, {"text": " If a specific customer requires a special invoice layout then you can create a custom invoice template that can then be assigned to that customer's card. All invoices/orders received by the customer will be in this format."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The documents that can be customised are:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Invoices / Orders"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Adjustment Notes"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Quotes"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto will automatically convert the HTML versions of the above documents into a PDF document."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1361-assign-customers-specific-invoice-layouts-or-designs#2", "children": [{"text": "Assign a Custom Template to a Customer"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1361-assign-customers-specific-invoice-layouts-or-designs#2", "children": [{"text": "Assign a Custom Document Template to an Order/Invoice"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Assign a Custom Template to a Customer"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can assign the custom document template that will be used for a customer on the customer's card:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Customers", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View customers & prospects", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the customer you wish to change."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down to the "}, {"text": "Payment details", "bold": true}, {"text": " section. Select the template set from the drop down list."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The assigned document template will then be used for all future orders, adjustment notes and quotes for that customer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Assign a Custom Document Template to an Order/Invoice"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can assign the default document format that will be used for a specific order:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Sales Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the order you wish to change."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down to the billing address section and select the document format."}]}, {"type":
